title: Amerite Gear & Tools
description: Changes the textures of netherite items to look like amethyst.
body:
This pack changes netherite items to look like amethyst!

Textures changed on this pack:

- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Shovel
- Netherite Hoe
- Netherite Helmet
- Netherite Chestplate
- Netherite Leggings
- Netherite Boots

This pack is also available to download on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/amerite-gear-and-tools) for _Bedrock Edition_.
